pr.title: Record: Full GPTQ + LeakyReLU² + Parallel Muon + BigramHash 3072 (val_bpb 1.1163, 3-seed mean)

output.summary: Parallel Muon/Parameter Banking with LeakyReLU² and a budgeted BigramHash table train within 16MB before Full Hessian GPTQ squeezes the weights.
techniques: Parallel Muon + Parameter Banking for faster training steps
Full Hessian GPTQ with Cholesky error compensation and actorder
BigramHash 3072×80 coverage-first hashing with learned projection
